# Image Assets

Please add your images to this folder:

## Required Images:

1. **vishal-photo.png** - Your professional photo for the About section
2. **moodbeats-project.png** - Screenshot of MoodBeats project
3. **lifeguard-project.png** - Screenshot of Life Guard Safety App
4. **citymart-project.png** - Screenshot of City Street Mart project

## How to use:
Once you upload these images to the `/public/images/` folder, they will automatically appear in your portfolio.
